```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
     <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="file-text" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Context</div>
    </div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;">CTX · 01</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.4em;">What Claude reads.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;color:#2C8475;">CLAUDE.md</code>
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;color:#2C8475;">rules/</code>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border-top:4px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
     <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="zap" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Capabilities</div>
    </div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;">CAP · 02</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.4em;">What Claude can act on.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;color:#C4881A;">MCPs</code>
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;color:#C4881A;">plugins</code>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);border-top:4px solid #D45F47;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
     <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FCEEEC,#FAD9D2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="sliders-horizontal" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;">Behaviors</div>
    </div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;">BHV · 03</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.4em;">How Claude operates.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FCEEEC;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;color:#D45F47;">skills</code>
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FCEEEC;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;color:#D45F47;">hooks</code>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border-top:4px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
     <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="users" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">Agents</div>
    </div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;">AGT · 04</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.4em;">Delegated execution.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;color:#5654A2;">subagents</code>
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;color:#5654A2;">verifiers</code>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
